title: Comprehensive business sections audit
description: Audit all major business sections (Calendly coaching call options, descriptions, reminders, links, buffers) and update to current best practices; extend to other sections as needed.
full_idea: Remember I need to go through every section of my business and make sure that it is all up-to-date. For example the different Calendly coaching call options/descriptions/message reminders/link/buffers, etc.
source_text: Remember I need to go through every section of my business and make sure that it is all up-to-date. For example the different Calendly coaching call options/descriptions/message reminders/link/buffers, etc.
